hero.subtitle: Software Developer with expertise in backend systems, cloud infrastructure (AWS), and microservices architecture

about.title: About Me
about.p1: Software Developer with {years}+ years of production experience building backend-heavy systems in Python and .NET, deploying cloud infrastructure on AWS, and developing cross-platform applications.
about.p2: Currently at Moneta Market, where I own the microservices architecture: a 6-container production platform integrating ML pipelines, event-driven webhooks, and a C# desktop app. I also work as an independent contractor building full-stack systems with React, FastAPI, and PostgreSQL.

experience.title: Work Experience
experience.monetaB1: Architected the company's first containerized platform: 6-service Docker Compose stack (2 FastAPI microservices, Label Studio, MLflow, Nginx reverse proxy) deployed on AWS EC2 with private networking and automated health checks
experience.monetaB2: Designed an 18-table PostgreSQL schema on AWS RDS with 18 foreign keys, 28+ strategic indexes, a custom idempotent migration system, and soft-delete audit trail; accessed via SSH tunnel through EC2 bastion host
experience.monetaB3: Built an event-driven FastAPI webhook service integrating Label Studio with S3: Repository pattern, atomic DB/S3 rollback on failure, async connection pooling, and in-memory cache with DB fallback
experience.monetaB4: Developed a cross-platform C# desktop app (.NET 10, Avalonia, migrated from Windows-only WPF) for human review of ML-labeled video frames: MVVM architecture, two-pass verification workflow, and sliding-window prefetch cache
experience.monetaB5: Implemented least-privilege IAM policies and AWS Secrets Manager for credential management; used LocalStack for local S3 emulation without exposing production credentials
experience.contractorB1: Built complete web and mobile applications using React, React Native, and Next.js, delivering responsive interfaces and optimized user experiences
experience.contractorB2: Designed backend architectures with FastAPI, Django, and Express.js, scalable RESTful APIs with PostgreSQL and SQLite, normalized schemas, and efficient query design
experience.contractorB3: Self-host client applications on a personal Linux server using Dokploy and Docker Compose (backends, frontends, and databases); manage DNS through Cloudflare and expose services securely with Cloudflare Tunnels (no open ports), offering clients a low-cost alternative to Vercel or AWS
experience.rogaB1: Maintained and extended the internal ERP used across 170+ branches and 1,750+ employees (Mueblería El Pasito / Villarreal Muebles / Dinexpress); built modules for multi-branch inventory, pricing, accounts receivable, and POS in .NET Framework
experience.rogaB2: Designed SQL Server database architecture supporting multi-branch retail operations: stored procedures for inventory aggregation and pricing logic, automated reports and email delivery via SQL Server Agent
experience.rogaB3: Standardized security practices across the development lifecycle: password manager for credential handling, physical security keys, and formalized coding processes

projects.title: Featured Projects
projects.scDesc: Full-stack system with cloud infrastructure, RESTful APIs, and database management. Built with Flask, PostgreSQL on AWS, and integrated ML capabilities.
projects.sdDesc: Custom dataset training for personalized image generation. Explored deep learning model fine-tuning techniques.
projects.galagaDesc: Unreal Engine game controlled via smartphone accelerometer using Processing and HTTP requests.

contact.title: Get In Touch
contact.subtitle: Looking to build backend systems, cloud infrastructure, or scalable APIs? Let's connect.
